pillars.conformance: NEW FUZZ HARNESS (bd-10sb.1, cargo-fuzz x4 targets) CAUGHT A REAL DoS ON ITS FIRST 512-RUN SMOKE: a 100-byte PNG declaring 6 x 2^31+4 dimensions made preprocess_bytes attempt a 38.6 GB allocation (the PDF path was bomb-bounded in bd-2zpu; the direct image ingest never was). Fixed at the single decode funnel (pdf.rs 1 Gpx policy pre-allocation + decoder width/height/alloc limits); the exact artifact is a committed corpus seed AND an always-on unit regression (typed InputDecode). All 4 targets now smoke clean
